series_metadata.series_title: Manufactured Home Installer License Applications and Renewals
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the application for or renewal of manufactured home installer licenses. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications, renewal forms, correspondence associated with an application or renewal of an installer license, employment verifications, reference letters, licenses, denials of licenses, continuing education records, installation examination results, proof of insurance and workers' compensation compliance, surety bond, etc..

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: If an electronic version of record exists, paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of record does not exist ; Electronic: record shall be destroyed three years submission
